title: Salisburyodendron ovata
taxonomy: Salisburyodendron ovata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Rwanda, and Burundi. Salisburyodendron ovata belongs to the genus Salisburyodendron, which contains only one species. It is a relatively small tree or shrub, typically growing up to 10 meters in height. The classification of Salisburyodendron ovata reflects its unique characteristics and distinct position within the plant kingdom.
